positive: A stylized celestial map featuring a prominent crescent moon and intertwining zodiac constellations. The background is a deep, swirling nebula in colors of indigo, sapphire, and emerald green. Use stark black line work and glowing metallic gold accents for the constellations and moon silhouette. The style must be neo-art deco and geometric, designed for a seamless, repeating textile pattern or central print. High contrast, clean outlines, vector art quality, central composition, ethereal bioluminescence, graphic design print.
